about.headline: Eat Drink Dance Repeat
about.body: ESCAPE is a community-first music festival now heading into its third year. The first edition took place on 28 March 2025, followed by the second on 28 February 2026. The next event will take place at Coconut Park 2 Koh Norea, bringing together families, friends, local talent, international acts and DJs across two stages.

faqs.question: When is the next festival?
faqs.answer: The third-year date is still marked as TBA in this prototype. Add the confirmed date once announced.

faqs.question: Where do I buy tickets?
faqs.answer: Tickets are planned at $10. Replace the ticket buttons with your confirmed booking link when ready.

faqs.question: Can families attend?
faqs.answer: Yes. ESCAPE is positioned as a family-friendly festival with music, food, open-air space and two stages.
